266727733.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900

jp.literal: It seemed a bit too bold of a move...

679710117.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
679710117.transcript: I was once envious of them too.

jp.text: かつては俺も憧れたものだよ
jp.literal: Heh. There was a time when I admired that too.

jp.text: レッドデトネーション！
いいだろ、バザラガ。俺もあとに続こう。
jp.literal: Fine by me, Vaseraga. I'll follow you too.

696612959.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
696612959.transcript: I would follow your flame anywhere.

702029544.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800

jp.literal: Hah! Leave it to me, Lancelot!

jp.text: ランカイのテンペスト！

jp.literal: Great sword! That's where you're wrong!

768108051.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
768108051.transcript: Rosetta, may I have the next dance as well?

jp.text: ロゼッタ、次も頼めるか？
jp.literal: Rosetta, can I count on you again?

775108704.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
775108704.transcript: I wouldn't put this burden on anyone.

jp.text: マァイをミアアヤマルナ

814416454.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300

jp.text: このまま油断せず行くぞ
jp.literal: I won't let my guard down from here on out!

823916501.transcript: I dare say you know something of awesome power yourself.

jp.text: どんな力も使いようだ。貴様なら分かるだろう。
jp.literal: No matter what power you use, you'll understand.

jp.text: みんなの力がこれほどとはな
jp.literal: I can't believe everyone's power has grown this much.

844442112.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
844442112.transcript: It was an honor to see your legendary speed firsthand.

jp.text: さすがの速さだ、ランスロット。
jp.literal: You're as fast as ever, Lancelot.
This is the perfect place to make a stand!

jp.text: 団長、また腕を上げたな
jp.literal: Captain, you're raising your arm again.

jp.text: ライデンのエラディケート！
次も皆の力を合わせるぞ！

904323822.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
904323822.transcript: High praise from the founder of alchemy herself.

jp.text: 舐めてもらっては困る、カリオストロ。
jp.literal: I'd appreciate it if you didn't lick me, Cagliostro.

908439382.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
908439382.transcript: I could say the same of you, Narmaya.

913497482.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
913497482.transcript: Your light magic is a superb complement to my own.

jp.text: 光の魔法か。相性は悪くなさそうだ。
jp.literal: A light mage, huh? We should get along just fine.

jp.text: ナラクのフォールダウン！
君の魔法のサポートのおかげだ

934177661.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800

969603648.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700

jp.text: ふん、迷いはもう振り払ったからな。
jp.literal: I've already shaken off my hesitation.

976596737.label: PL2100_vo_SP_pl_offset1_1
976596737.transcript: Guide me, direct me, by your light!

jp.text: 願いを、約束を、俺は守る！
jp.literal: I'll protect your wishes, your promises!
Alright, let's prepare for the next one!

jp.text: エアロデトネーション！

990714825.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
990714825.transcript: To think even I could not keep up with you.

jp.text: 目で追えなかったんだと
jp.literal: I couldn't have done it without you.

1000983546.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
1000983546.transcript: Your magic grows ever more fearsome.

jp.text: 悪くないな。いい魔法だ。
jp.literal: Not bad. That's a good spell.

jp.text: ああ、インソフウォール！

1021815411.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
1021815411.transcript: That act of yours endears you to no one.

jp.text: まったく、しらじらしいにも程がある
何時に福音を授けよう
jp.literal: I'll grant you salvation at any hour.
Don't you dare take my blood!

1044412042.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
1044412042.transcript: I was correct to trust your swordplay.

jp.text: よし、任せた甲斐があったな。
jp.literal: Good. I'm glad I could leave it to you.
Don't let your guard down, Io.
This guy's really going for it!

jp.text: クレバーナイチゲキだった

1065267301.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
1065267301.transcript: Unless my eyes deceive me, you're capable of the same speed.

jp.text: ふん、君こそこのレベルの動きは造作もないはずだが
jp.literal: Hmph. You, of all people, shouldn't be able to move at this level.

1066701038.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
1066701038.transcript: This sky dweller could give Uriel a run for his money.

jp.text: この領略、空の民でありながらウリエルに試験するか。
jp.literal: You dare test me, Uriel, with this power?

1067938608.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
1067938608.transcript: We can't let even a single foe escape.

jp.text: 決して誰もやらせはしない
jp.literal: I won't let anyone do it!

27056266.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
27056266.transcript: You had that brewing for a while, didn't you?

jp.text: あ、ああ、あとで用意しよう。
因果を喰らう技か。興味深い。
jp.literal: So you're going to hit me with a counter move? How interesting.

jp.text: ふん、そのセリフそのまま返すよ
jp.literal: Hmph. I'll return that line to you.

64747673.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
64747673.transcript: Divine strength comes in all sizes, it seems.

jp.text: 聖なる力を纏いし剣戟か…
jp.literal: I'll take that power and turn it into a sword.

77285393.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
77285393.transcript: I'm assuming that's a good thing.

jp.text: ああ、このペースを維持しよう

78272965.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0000
78272965.transcript: Heh... plan on surpassing me someday?

jp.text: ふん。君はどこまで成長するつもりだ？
jp.literal: Hmph. How far do you intend to grow?

86507469.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
86507469.transcript: Shall we break for coffee when time permits?

jp.text: ふん。落ち着いたらコーヒー・ブレイクといこう。
jp.literal: Hmph. Let's call it a coffee break when things calm down.

121388993.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
121388993.transcript: What if you tried fighting smarter, not harder?

jp.text: もう少しスマートさを意識してみては？
jp.literal: Why don't you try being a bit smarter?

122632333.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
122632333.transcript: To control a full flock of blades as if it were nothing... you have my respect.

jp.text: これほどの数の獲物を同時に操るとは、大したものだ。
jp.literal: To control this many targets at once... impressive.

jp.text: 悪くない連携だったな

154426187.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
154426187.transcript: Seems you've grown accustomed to your powers.

jp.text: リュウの力を使いこなしているようだな
jp.literal: You seem to be mastering the power of the dragon.

154639616.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
154639616.transcript: I made it extra sweet. Your taste buds will thank me.

jp.text: 特別に甘さをプラスしておいた。口に合えばいいが。
jp.literal: I've added a special sweetness to it. I hope it's to your liking.

170351071.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
170351071.transcript: Your command over dark powers... it's impressive.

jp.text: アーカイブを下がえるとは、見上げたものだ。
jp.literal: I never thought I'd see the day when I'd follow a demon.

192345552.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
192345552.transcript: I'll treat you to a cup after we've cleaned up here.

jp.text: よければ後で一杯ふるまう
jp.literal: If you're feeling up to it, let's have a drink later.

204037557.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
204037557.transcript: High praise from the Lord of Flames.

jp.text: エンテイの期待には応えられたかな？
jp.literal: Did I live up to your expectations?

221708775.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
221708775.transcript: Is there any foe you can't hunt down?

jp.text: ナーアニモーカモーカリツクサンという勢いだな
jp.literal: You've got quite the momentum, Vaseraga.

230934105.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
230934105.transcript: All because you adapt so well to my techniques.

jp.text: 君がこちらに合わせてくれたのだと思うが
jp.literal: I think you've come here to meet me.

237743307.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
237743307.transcript: Get out of my wings, boy! Out!

jp.text: 羽の中に隠れていたぞ
jp.literal: You were hiding in the wings.

242951006.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
242951006.transcript: It seems conceit is a powerful motivator for a genius.

jp.text: サスガマ オノレヲ テンサイト ジフフスル ダケノコトハ アル
jp.literal: You're just a genius in your own mind.

247426150.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
247426150.transcript: It takes a greater strength to protect than to destroy.

jp.text: 世界を終わらせる救済など、間違っている。
jp.literal: You're mistaken about a salvation that ends the world.

252313654.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
252313654.transcript: The consequence of fusing our powers, no doubt.

jp.text: 君らと力を合わせればこそだ
jp.literal: If we combine our powers with yours...

260254541.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
260254541.transcript: If not magic, then how is that lightning generated?

jp.text: そのイカズチ、魔法によるものでないと考えると、驚異的だな。
jp.literal: That lightning... It's incredible, especially if it's not magic.

265155199.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
265155199.transcript: All for the sake of peace.

jp.text: この力、皆を守るために振るおう。
jp.literal: Let this power fall to protect everyone.

265359368.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
265359368.transcript: You've a gift with aerial combat.

jp.text: 空中戦もお手の物とはな。
jp.literal: Even aerial combat is within your expertise, huh?

279102449.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
279102449.transcript: The growth of your prowess has been a delight to observe.

jp.text: ここでまで魔力を練り上げられるとは、見事だ。
jp.literal: To be able to gather magic to this extent... remarkable.

284548032.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
284548032.transcript: Don't be absurd! Now's not the time!

jp.text: エイイイイ！今はそれどころではない！
jp.literal: Hey! Now's not the time for that!

jp.text: ほう。楽しみにしておこう
jp.literal: Oh, I'll look forward to it.

345572560.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
345572560.transcript: Such power could rival the Archangels.

jp.text: なんてパワフルな追撃だ

367913751.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
367913751.transcript: You are a true fusion of power and finesse.

jp.text: 力と技、どちらも兼ね備えているか。
jp.literal: Do you have both power and skill?

389001253.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
389001253.transcript: You're just toying with them at this point.

jp.text: まだまだ余裕のようだな
jp.literal: You still seem to have some leeway.

jp.text: チャーカサナイデクレ

395009636.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
395009636.transcript: The unity of our crew bolsters me.

jp.text: ミナと共にあればこそ、恐るるものなど何もないさ。
jp.literal: With everyone by my side, there's truly nothing to fear.

412776627.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
412776627.transcript: My power is yours. Use it wisely.

jp.literal: This power... use it for me.
So this is the power of the Guardian's sword?

427232246.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
427232246.transcript: Your eyesight may rival that of even an angel.

jp.text: トッサにアレにアテルトワ。イイメオモッテイルナ。
jp.literal: You've got quite the eye to hit that so quickly.

444755540.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
444755540.transcript: Since time immemorial, the six dragons have protected these skies.

jp.text: 遥か昔から…君ら六竜は空を守ってきたのだな。
jp.literal: So you six have been protecting the sky since ancient times.

jp.text: ああ、悪くなかったのでは？

464555424.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
464555424.transcript: Your flattery won't work on me.

jp.text: おだてても何も出ないぞ
jp.literal: Even if you're all worked up, nothing's gonna come of it.

jp.text: ふん、それはお互い様だ

499744485.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
499744485.transcript: No less merciful than a reaper.

jp.literal: You're the one who's going to say that?
So it's "Talviyo"... What a beautiful technique.

jp.text: ああ、さんざん迷った先に今の俺がある
jp.literal: Ah... the path I wandered so aimlessly has led me to who I am now.

543917984.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
543917984.transcript: Yes. Battle to your heart's content.

jp.text: ああ、存分に戦ってくれて構わない
jp.literal: Ah, I don't mind if you fight to your heart's content.

jp.text: 圧倒的だな、ジークフリート
よし、スピーディーに片付ける
jp.literal: Alright, let's wrap this up quickly.

564055623.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
564055623.transcript: Call me by that name again, and I'm leaving.

jp.text: おい！ドサクサでおかしな名で呼ぶんじゃない！
jp.literal: Hey, don't call me by some weird name like that!

580492551.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
580492551.transcript: General, consider not staring at me with such bloodlust.

jp.text: ……死なさだめするような目で見るのはやめてくれ
jp.literal: Stop looking at me with those eyes that seem to judge my fate.
For the sake of the sky!

600870290.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
600870290.transcript: When observing your deeds, the word "courageous" comes to mind.

jp.text: 君を見ていると、勇気という言葉が浮かんでくるよ。
jp.literal: When I look at you, the word 'courage' comes to mind.

614107721.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
614107721.transcript: I am grateful for your aid.

661338197.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
661338197.transcript: I fear your potential knows no bounds.

jp.text: 相変わらずそこがしれないな。君の力は。
jp.literal: As always, I can't fathom your power.

jp.text: 素晴らしい集中力だ、ソーン。

691032797.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
691032797.transcript: It's more valuable than you could ever know.

jp.text: 託された想いを手放しはしない。決して。
jp.literal: I won't let go of the feelings I've hidden. Never.

jp.text: フェディエル、火星に感謝する

703809207.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
703809207.transcript: If you practiced more restraint, cleanup would be far easier.

jp.text: もう少し力を抑えてくれると、後始末が楽なんだがな。
jp.literal: If you could hold back a bit more on your power, cleanup would be easier.

705412495.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
705412495.transcript: An appropriate combination should dissuade our foes.

jp.text: ふん。それで相手が従ってくれたなら苦労はしないが。
jp.literal: Hmph. If the opponent just follows along, then I won't have to go to the trouble.

706504562.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
706504562.transcript: Amazing how even mere pets can prove so stalwart.

jp.text: フェリのペットたちも重要な戦力と言えるな
jp.literal: Ferry's pets are quite the asset too.

711088207.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
711088207.transcript: Yes, for power corrupts when left to its own devices.

jp.text: ユーステス、強さには相応の責任が伴うものだからな。

717295545.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
717295545.transcript: That was quite the powerful blow.

jp.text: 実にパワフルな攻撃だな

725258896.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
725258896.transcript: Hm. You remind me of Uriel, the Primarch of Earth.

jp.text: ふむ。土の天使ウリエルにも匹敵するパワーだ。
jp.literal: Hmph. A power that rivals even Uriel, the Angel of Earth.

732293406.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
732293406.transcript: We must bring peace and quiet to the skies.

jp.text: 平穏と静寂を、この空にもたらさなければな。
jp.literal: I must bring peace and silence to this sky.

jp.text: その想い、応えてみせよ。

763378429.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
763378429.transcript: May we claim many victories in the battles to come.

jp.text: これからも頼むぞ、ラカム。
jp.literal: I'm counting on you from now on, Rackam.

780506430.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
780506430.transcript: Thank you. Your empathy is welcome.

jp.text: ありがとう。頼りにさせてもらう。
jp.literal: Thank you. I'll rely on you.

790884997.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
790884997.transcript: Black of the six dragons, with domain over darkness.

jp.literal: Six dragons' darkness... the denial of shadows?

808173451.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
808173451.transcript: To be blunt, you actually work well with others.

jp.text: ブッキラボウに見えて、連携への気配りは完璧か。
jp.literal: You look like a real show-off, but your teamwork is flawless.
I won't let you get away!

852858065.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
852858065.transcript: And yours is the edge betwixt life and death.

jp.text: そして人を生かすのが、君の刃というわけだな。
jp.literal: So your sword's purpose is to protect people, huh?

890049371.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
890049371.transcript: Give them no room to breathe.

jp.text: とっしんりょくはかおう、ベアトリクス
そんな約束はしていない
jp.literal: I never made such a promise.

jp.text: その呼び方はやめてくれ

945798892.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
945798892.transcript: The power of these wings serves the skies.

jp.text: この天使の力は、空のために。
jp.literal: This angel's power... for the sake of the sky.

jp.text: カッカクタルノミゴトナチカラダ

1017735182.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
1017735182.transcript: You have quite the talent, helmsman.

jp.text: 素晴らしい腕前だ、ラカム！

jp.literal: So this is what you call a "Transformation of the Elements"?
So this is the power of the people of the sky?

1042666618.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
1042666618.transcript: Don't mention it. Let us move on.

jp.text: 礼はいらない。次に備えるぞ。
jp.literal: No need for formalities. Let's prepare for what comes next.

1060188999.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
1060188999.transcript: Understood. But mind your own health as well.

jp.text: ああ。だがくれぐれも無理はするなよ。
アテにしてくれて構わない
jp.literal: I don't mind being counted on.

1068883552.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
1068883552.transcript: Perhaps our lessons were too strict.

49265900.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
49265900.transcript: Stay vigilant. There's more to be done.

jp.text: 次も集中していくぞ、ソーン！
jp.literal: I'll keep focusing on the next one too, Tweyen!

114196529.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
114196529.transcript: And this was only a fraction of my capabilities.

jp.text: これはまだほんの一部にすぎないがな
jp.literal: This is still just the tip of the iceberg.

120159444.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
120159444.transcript: With your support, I have nothing to fear.

398418751.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
398418751.transcript: The Eternals are certainly a mighty bunch.

jp.text: これが十天収果か。強大な力だ。
jp.literal: So this is the Ten-Point Seal... a mighty power.

468040844.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
468040844.transcript: I like to leave a bold impression.

jp.text: ああ、今の感覚を忘れるなよ

530850092.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
530850092.transcript: Let me stop you right there.

jp.text: 実にシャープな一撃だ
jp.literal: That was a really sharp strike.

jp.text: ふん、騒ぐほどでもない
jp.literal: No need to make such a fuss.

800812813.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
800812813.transcript: Seofon, that looked suspiciously easy for you.

jp.text: ふん。随分と余裕があるみたいだが。
jp.literal: Hmph. You seem to have quite a bit of leeway.

jp.text: 当然のことをしたまでだ
jp.literal: I did what was only natural.

962017134.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
962017134.transcript: Where would you be without us?

985291689.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
985291689.transcript: Seofon, I insist you fight at your actual level next time.

jp.text: 次は本気で行くぞ、シエテ！
jp.literal: Next, I'm going in for real, Seofon.
